title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The Advantage Savings Account provides you a complete banking convenience and financial package to access your money with the ease. IDBI Bank offers you a range of savings account for optimal management of your money. With Account, you not only save your money but also make it grow.
  * MAB – Rs. 10,000 (Metro & Urban), Rs. 5000 (Semi Urban), Rs. 2500 (Rural) and Rs. 1,000 (Rural FI).


  * Free five ATM transactions at other Bank ATMs at Non Metro Locations


  * Good options to grow money at attractive interest rates Instant Banking


Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service) 
What is the minimum balance that I need to maintain in the Advantage Savings Account? 
You need to maintain an Monthly Average Balance (MAB) of Rs. 10000 in the Advantage Savings Account for Metro & Urban Branches, Rs. 5000/- for semi urban Branches and Rs. 1000/- for Rural Branches.
What is the rate of interest applicable on the Advantage Savings Account?
Interest on Savings Bank Account is applicable as per Banks latest prevailing rate of Interest hosted on Banks website.
